title: AgentCore Update Manifest
description: Signed manifest listing available AgentCore releases. Served from S3/CloudFront at updates.agentcore.io/manifest.json

schema_version.description: Manifest schema version. Increment only on breaking changes.

published_at.description: ISO8601 UTC timestamp when this manifest was last published.

latest.description: Shortcut to the latest version string per tier. Clients read this first.

tier1.description: Latest version recommended for Tier 1 hardware.

tier2.description: Latest version recommended for Tier 2 hardware.

tier3.description: Latest version recommended for Tier 3 hardware.

tier4.description: Latest version recommended for Tier 4 hardware.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature (hex) over the canonical JSON of all fields except 'signature' itself. Clients must verify before trusting any release data.

published_at.description: ISO8601 UTC timestamp when this release was published.

min_version.description: Minimum installed version that can upgrade to this release. Omit if any version can upgrade.

changelog.description: Markdown changelog for this release. Shown in the admin dashboard update banner.

critical.description: If true, the dashboard shows a prominent security/critical update warning.

components.description: Container image and model updates included in this release.

models.description: Model file updates (Ollama GGUF or safetensors).

image_url.description: HTTPS URL to the Docker image tar.gz on our S3/CloudFront CDN.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the image file. Must be verified before applying.

size_bytes.description: Uncompressed file size in bytes. Used to show download progress.

docker_tag.description: Docker image tag to apply after loading (e.g. agentcore:1.1.0).

name.description: Model name as used in Ollama (e.g. qwen2.5:7b).

tiers.description: Hardware tiers for which this model update applies.

download_url.description: Direct HTTPS URL to download the model file.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the model file.

optional.description: If true, this model update can be skipped by the user.
